message:
feat(telemetry): add QueueStats UnifiedTelemetryRecord adapter (ft-3681t.7.1)

Add from_queue_stats() adapter and From<&QueueStats> impl for
UnifiedTelemetryRecord. Maps SwarmWorkQueue statistics into the unified
telemetry pipeline with health tier classification based on failure
rate and blocked ratio thresholds. 6 unit tests covering healthy,
black (high failure), red (high blocked), yellow (moderate failure),
empty queue, and From trait dispatch.

This completes the swarm work-queue coverage gap in the unified
telemetry schema, complementing the existing scheduler snapshot and
mux pool adapters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
